name: SoftJunk One Buyer Share Route
purpose: A browser-only share action surface for sending one relevant buyer a safe SoftJunk 5 USD one-lead rescue handoff through email, SMS, WhatsApp, native share, or copy/paste without scraping, spam, private data, or false payment claims.
fit_rules: Use only when there is one known relevant buyer with one real quiet lead problem.
Use when one recovered conversation, quote, appointment, or job is worth more than 5 USD.
Use placeholders and generic business context only.
do_not_use_when: The recipient is from a scraped list or cold spam batch.
The buyer asks for spam, deception, fake reviews, scraping, or unauthorized outreach.
The message would include customer names, phone numbers, emails, addresses, invoice IDs, transaction IDs, payer email, PayPal details, or private lead data.
The buyer expects fulfillment before seller-side PayPal verification.
privacy_rule: The browser-side generator does not submit data. Prefilled share links place field values in the URL, so only non-sensitive context should be used. Share actions stay disabled until the sender confirms this is one known relevant buyer and no private identifier is detected.
verification_gate: This route is a payment path, not payment proof. Do not claim paid, started, delivered, fulfilled, complete, received, or stop unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists or PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
copyable_buyer_message_template: If one [lead problem] is sitting quiet and [value reason], this is the smallest useful test I found. SoftJunk builds one practical follow-up rescue for $5. For no-clone checkout proof, run: npm exec --yes --package https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/releases/download/v2.29.118/softjunk-lead-kit-0.2.1.tgz -- softjunk-lead-kit pay --mode custom --json. Verify release notes at https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/releases/tag/v2.29.119 and SHA-256 c9ca809f1d13c2b06c3531bbf1850c56cba263fb8940c7ea73b8cfdfa5494d9d. Pay exactly $5 at https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD, use the generated PayPal note, then submit non-sensitive context at the order form. Fulfillment starts only after seller-side PayPal verification.
paypal_note_template: One Lead Rescue | Business: [buyer type] | Service: [service] | Source: one-buyer-share | Need: [lead problem] | Tone: [tone] | Next: reply
